summary: Test suite covers happy-path scenarios (3 fixtures, output formats, status classification) but has critical gaps: missing error handling tests (invalid JSON, bad dates, missing fields), no edge-case coverage (empty arrays, boundary ages, custom parameters), fixtures referenced but not created in test code, brittle act output parsing (extract_block assumes markers not shown being produced by workflow), and no demonstration of fixture setup or isolation. Would catch regressions in main workflow execution but fail to detect errors in error paths, parameter variations, or boundary conditions. Tests assume infrastructure (fixture files, act markers) without proving it's in place.
